ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 6 X 24) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the size (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product for the given quantity and size */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Discounted price of the product */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the price */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the price */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder for the product */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Stock status of the product (e.g., in stock, out of stock, backorder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order (e.g., ground, air, express) */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Shipping status of the order (e.g., shipped, pending, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sales) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the category the product belongs to
Stock Keeping Unit of the product
Unit of measurement for the size (e.g., inches, centimeters)
Price of the product for the given quantity and size
Discount percentage applied to the product
Unique identifier for each inventory entry
Quantity to reorder for the product
Stock status of the product (e.g., in stock, out of stock, backorder)
Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, pending, failed)
Shipping method used for the order (e.g., ground, air, express)
Shipping status of the order (e.g., shipped, pending, delivered)
Unique identifier for each order item
Quantity of the product in the order
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sales)
Date and time of the user's last login
